title: Daoist Canon: Tianshi Way Scriptures (Section 1)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Tianshi Way Scriptures
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Tianshi Way Scriptures

translation.text: From the Tianshi Way Scriptures of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
